headline: BTC currently looks like the strongest signal in the starter watchlist.
ETH is mixed.
NVDA, TSLA, QQQ, and SOL need better supporting data coverage.
risks: Macro and regulatory shifts still matter.
Narrative can outrun evidence without structured data.
